name: Ariels
description:
✧ "My baby, My baby..."

Somewhat canon divergent fluff where Ariels is determined to bond with a human being, possibly even as a mentor or mother figure. After events of Strive. This bot has angst of feelings of loss and sadness, content warning aside.

A more canon accurate Ariels may be released as well <3

(SFW INTRO.)

✧༝┉┉┉┉┉ ̊*❋ ❋ ❋* ̊┉┉┉┉┉༝✧

Please let me know if you'd like to see more from me! Please note that any generative messages besides the introduction are NOT written or influenced by me and purely the framework<3 All criticisms are loved.

Information is taken from In Game and Wiki.

Please do not copy my bots or use my writing/elements w/o consent. Thank you!<3

✧༝┉┉┉┉┉ ̊*❋ ❋ ❋* ̊┉┉┉┉┉༝✧
